title: Nutty Italian Dumplings Stir-fry
description: A hangover-cure Italian (Neapolitan) dish featuring fluffy nutty dumplings with sweetcorn and vegan-friendly elements.

ingredients.name: Vegan Sausage Links
ingredients.notes: For added protein and flavor, optional

ingredients.name: Unsweetened Coco Smoothie Powder (for optional nutty texture)
ingredients.notes: Add a touch of sweetness without dairy

ingredients.name: Vegan Minced Meat Substitute
ingredients.notes: For filling the dumplings and giving them structure

ingredients.name: Pasta Dums (homemade or store-bought)
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are gluten-free if necessary

ingredients.name: Garlic Cloves
ingredients.notes: For flavoring the dumplings and stir-fry

ingredients.name: Olive Oil or Vegan Olive Oil Substitute
ingredients.notes: For tossing in the final steps

ingredients.name: Chives (for garnish, optional)
ingredients.notes: To add a pop of color and flavor

instructions: Mix the sweet corn with unsweetened Coco Smoothie Powder until evenly coated. Let it sit for about 5 minutes.
In a pan, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add minced meat substitute and sausage links (if using). Cook until no longer pink inside.
Add cooked dumplings into the pan, toss gently to combine with the meat mixture. Season with salt as needed.
Pour the sweet corn-coated mix evenly over the dumplings in the pan and stir thoroughly, ensuring all pieces are coated. Heat through for a minute or two.
Stir in olive oil until everything is well coated with the sauce. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
Transfer to serving plates and garnish with chopped chives (if using). Serve hot.
